title: Thananana Thanthanaa Lyrics Vithagan Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Swetha Mohan
Song: Thananana Thanthanaa
Lyrics: R Parthiban
Movie: Vithagan
Music Joshua Sridhar

Thananana Thanthanaa
indha tuniin vaarthai edhuvo
Thona thona endrennai
manam nacharipadheno
Ragasiyamaagave ennai naane paarpadhenno
o oh o oh o oh oh ...

Thananana Thanthanaa
indha tuniin vaarthai edhuvo
Thona thona endrennai
manam nacharipadheno
Ragasiyamaagave ennai naane paarpadhenno
yenno pudhidhaai pala kelvi mulaipadheno
o oh adada idhidhaan adhuvo..

Poovukkul pullarikkum punnagayai nee thoovaadhe
Kolaaru nee cool-aaga seiyaadhe
Kaal medhu kaal pottu imai kudaiyil nee amaraadhe
Thodhaaga neeyum sedhaaram seiyaadhe

Aasai kaattrin soroobam
Mundhaanai seendidum aavesam
Kaaval aayiram potta podhum
Tharai melum oorvalam dhaan kaadhal

indha tuniin vaarthai edhuvo

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Thananana Thanthanaa conveys a sense of joy and celebration, inviting listeners to embrace happiness and dance.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Vithagan, this song is featured during a lively party scene, enhancing the festive atmosphere.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Shweta Mohan and composed by Joshua Sridhar.

When was the song released?

Thananana Thanthanaa was released on October 23, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thananana Thanthanaa, the vibrant energy of the song mirrors the joyous moments in Vithagan. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and celebration, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. Shweta Mohan's lively vocals, combined with Joshua Sridhar's dynamic music, create an infectious rhythm that encourages listeners to dance. This song encapsulates the spirit of fun and togetherness, resonating with anyone looking to uplift their mood.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thananana Thanthanaa from Vithagan is a vibrant celebration of joy and rhythm, perfectly encapsulating the essence of a lively party anthem. With Shweta Mohan's captivating vocals and Joshua Sridhar's energetic composition, this track is bound to get you on your feet. Dive into the infectious beats and let the music take over your spirit!
stanzaMeanings: This phrase is about a word that feels special to me, making my heart dance. I wonder if I am being watched secretly, oh oh oh oh oh...
This phrase is about a word that feels special to me, making my heart dance. I wonder if I am being watched secretly, and I have many questions in my mind, oh oh, is that really it?
Don't disturb the flower that blooms in the garden. Don't act cool. Don't put your foot on the ground and stay in the shade. You shouldn't act like a stranger.
The form of desire is like a breeze. It brings a feeling that can change everything. Just one look is enough to make the world spin with love.
Oh oh... is that really it? Is that really it?
